user.title: Connect to TVHeadend
user.description: Enter the details of your TVHeadend server. Leave the username and password blank for anonymous access.

data_description.maxconn: How many concurrent stream entities to expose. You can change this later in the integration options.

discovery_confirm.title: TVHeadend discovered
discovery_confirm.description: A TVHeadend server was found at {name}. Enter your credentials to finish setup (leave blank for anonymous access). Adjust the port if the web interface does not use the default.

data_description.maxconn: How many concurrent stream entities to expose. You can change this later in the integration options.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check the host and port.

abort.already_configured: This TVHeadend server is already configured.

data_description.maxconn: How many concurrent stream entities to expose. Changing this reloads the integration.
data_description.stream_profile: TVHeadend streaming profile used by the camera. 'pass' plays video natively; for audio see the go2rtc note in the README.
